recent_activity.body:
## Implementation Follow-up to #41

**Specification**: See #41 comment for detailed specification and requirements.  
**Task breakdown**: [docs/ISSUE_41_TASK_BREAKDOWN.md](./docs/ISSUE_41_TASK_BREAKDOWN.md)

---

## Summary

Implement Mixed-Element mesh support in ADMESH-Domains catalog:
1. Add element_type validation (enum: triangle, quadrilateral, Mixed-Element)
2. Unit tests for schema validation
3. Integration test: fort1

recent_activity.title: chore: sync DomI@121636a
recent_activity.body:
DomI upstream advanced. Sync this repo before next write session.

**Upstream commit:** [121636a](https://github.com/domattioli/DomI/commit/121636a9b00af8dbf0e41d7b69746d9f87e133d7)
**Triggered by:** `push`

### Changed paths
```
CLAUDE.md
```

### How to resolve

Open a Claude Code session in this repo and say:

> sync from DomI

Claude will invoke the `sync-from-domi` skill, refresh `.domi-pin`, and close this issue.

### Manual resolution

```bash
bash skills/sync-from-domi/scripts/update_pin

recent_activity.body:
## DomI upstream has new changes

DomI `main` was updated. Your `.domi-pin` is now out of date.

**New DomI SHA:** `121636a9b00af8dbf0e41d7b69746d9f87e133d7`

### What changed (2026-05-11)

- `CLAUDE.md` — replaced legacy generic doc with DomI-specific governance (branch policy, push antipattern #31, skill closure protocol, sync contract)
- `requirements.txt` — added root-level deps (manim>=0.20.0)
- `scripts/instructions_on_start.sh` — added `claude/*` branch hard-stop + `.githooks/` auto-insta
